message:
🌱 cilium: An error occurred when enabling host network mode through Helm (#1851)

* 🌱 Add cilium: An error occurred when enabling host network mode through mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add cilium: An error occurred when enabling host network mode through mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cilium-34028-an-error-occurred-when-enabling-host-network-mode-through-helm",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cilium: An error occurred when enabling host network mode through Helm",
+    "description": "An error occurred when enabling host network mode through Helm. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify cilium troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your cilium deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium -n cilium --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cilium configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium
```
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [X] I have searched the existing issues

### Version

higher than v1.16.0 and lower than v1.17.0

### What happened?

 helm install cilium cilium -n kube-system
Error: INSTALLATION FAILED: 1 error"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for An error occurred when enabling host network mode through…",
+        "description": "FWIW the following diff applied to the helm chart seems to enable the workaround proposed by .
```diff
diff --git a/install/kubernetes/cilium/templates/validate.yaml b/install/kubernetes/cilium/templates/validate.yaml
index 8bc687dbff..b7101df1a5 100644
---
```yaml
kubeProxyReplacement: true
k8sServiceHost: auto  # Read from kubeadm-config configMap
ingressController:
  enabled: true
  default: true
  enforceHttps: true
  loadbalancerMode: dedicated
  service:
    externalTrafficPolicy: "~"
  # Configure the Envoy listeners to be exposed on the host network.
  hostNetwork:
    enabled: true
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm An error occurred when enabling host network mode… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium -n cilium --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "FWIW the following diff applied to the helm chart seems to enable the workaround proposed by .",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kubeProxyReplacement: true
k8sServiceHost: auto  # Read from kubeadm-config configMap
ingressController:
  enabled: true
  default: true
  enforceHttps: true
  loadbalancerMode: dedicated
  service:
    externalTrafficPolicy: "~"
  # Configure the Envoy listeners to be exposed on the host network.
  hostNetwork:
    enabled: true",
+        "kubeProxyReplacement: true
k8sServiceHost: auto  # Read from kubeadm-config configMap
ingressController:
  enabled: true
  default: true
  enforceHttps: true
  loadbalancerMode: dedicated
  service:
    # https://github.com/cilium/cilium/issues/34028
    type: ClusterIP
    externalTrafficPolicy: "~"
  # Configure the Envoy listeners to be exposed on the host network.
  hostNetwork:
    enabled: true",
+        "---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: podinfo
  labels:
    app: podinfo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: podinfo

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: podinfo
spec:
  ingressClassName: cilium
  rules:
    - host: <host>
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: podinfo
                port:
                  number: 8080"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cilium",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cilium"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cilium/cilium/issues/34028",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cilium/cilium"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 24,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cilium installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:39:08.538Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
